description: The male protagonist of the series. Brutally killed after a life of abuse. He was summoned by Elizabeth and made to work as her servant. Due to his experiences in life, strong emotions such as fear, anger and hatred cause him to become unusually calm.

Califa is an outspoken feminist, she considered any offense of her superiors as "sexual harassment". Califa has eaten the Awa Awa fruit, that gives her the powers to become a soap woman.

name: Kuro
description: He is a junior high school student who is [Ramune](https://anilist.co/character/187923)'s disciple and works as an assistant. He has good judgment and motor skills, as well as a rational mind. It's hard to understand his mood due to having a poker face and is always having to play the straight man when Ramune says or does anything. Kuro trusts Ramune's skills as a specialist of mystery diseases completely.

name: Lana Colette
description: A second-year student in the high school division at Serendia Academy, she is [Monica](https://anilist.co/character/249404)'s classmate. Her father is a wealthy merchant, and her family rose to the ranks of baron, so some of her classmates and nobles mock her and call her a "nouveau riche". She is strong-willed, so she doesn't care about such insults. As she comes from a family of merchants, she is well-informed about fashion. name: Mosquito Musume
description: Mosquito Girl (モスキート娘 Mosukito Musume) is a prototype artificial mutant created by Dr. Genus of the House of Evolution. As a hybrid between human and mosquito, she has control over large swarms of the insects, using them to collect blood as sustenance or repair any bodily damage.

name: Musashi Miyamoto
description: A clone of the legendary Musashi Miyamoto, reanimated by the dark arts of Mitsunari Tokugawa's sister.

She's wearing prosthesis that looks like real legs.!~

name: Puniru
